cases.title: Testing-plan §7 Report after close: per-session report available within 10 minutes of closedAt
preconditions: Active session with enrolled students and mixed attendance (Present, Pending) for assigned class-subject
Authenticated assigned Instructor session with report:read scope
TestClock controllable or wall-clock timing harness per testing-plan §11
Full E2E stack: PostgreSQL, API on port 3001
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close and record closedAt timestamp T_close
Immediately poll GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId every 30 seconds until HTTP 200 with complete roster or 10-minute timeout
Assert first successful response includes all enrolled students with finalized statuses (no Pending rows)
Assert summary counts (present, absent, excused) reflect SessionCloseFinalize (Pending → Absent)
Record elapsed wall time T_elapsed from T_close to first complete report response
Assert T_elapsed ≤ 600 seconds (10 minutes) per NFR-07 and testing-plan §7 Report after close row
cases.expected: NFR-07 verification method satisfied: instructor can view complete session report within 10 minutes of session close per 07-non-functional-risk §2.2 and OBJ-03

cases.title: ReportService.getSessionRoster returns complete roster from PostgreSQL within 10 minutes after SessionService.close
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running via Compose
Active session with 50+ enrolled students and mixed attendance records
SessionService.close and ReportService.getSessionRoster wired to real repositories
High-resolution timer around close → first successful getSessionRoster call
steps: Record T0 and invoke SessionService.close(sessionId) to transition Active → Closed and finalize Pending → Absent
Poll ReportService.getSessionRoster(sessionId, instructorId) every 5 seconds until complete ReportDto returned or 10-minute timeout
Assert ReportDto contains one row per enrolled student with no Pending status
Assert aggregation counts match attendance_records table after finalizeOnClose
Record T1 when first complete roster returned
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 600000 ms (10 minutes)
cases.expected: Module-integration boundary: report read model materializes complete session roster within NFR-07 latency budget after close side effects commit

cases.title: Session Active → Closed transition makes finalized attendance visible in report within 10 minutes
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with session beforeState Active and N students with mix of Present and Pending attendance
SessionService.close triggers AttendanceService.finalizeOnClose per API design §5.5
ReportService queries attendance_records and sessions tables
steps: Record beforeState: session status Active; count Pending attendance rows
Invoke SessionService.close(sessionId) and assert afterState session status Closed with closedAt set
Assert Pending rows transitioned to Absent in attendance_records
Poll ReportService.getSessionRoster until roster reflects afterState (zero Pending, correct absent count)
Measure elapsed time from close commit to first accurate report
Assert elapsed time ≤ 10 minutes per NFR-07
cases.expected: beforeState Active+Pending; afterState Closed+Absent finalized; complete session report available within NFR-07 window

cases.title: GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId returns HTTP 200 with complete roster within 10 minutes of close
preconditions: API running against healthy Compose PostgreSQL
Closed session fixture: instructor closes Active session with enrolled cohort
Authenticated assigned Instructor session cookie set
SessionId known with closedAt recorded
steps: Record T0 at POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close completion (HTTP 200 status Closed)
Poll GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId with Instructor session every 30 s
On HTTP 200, assert response body contains sessionId, summary counts, and records array per API design §8.1
Assert records array length equals enrolled student count with no Pending status values
Record T1 on first HTTP 200 with complete roster
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 600 seconds
cases.expected: HTTP 200 report contract delivered within NFR-07 target: complete per-session roster accessible to authorized instructor ≤ 10 minutes after close

cases.title: GET /api/v1/reports/summary returns HTTP 200 with class-subject aggregation within 10 minutes of session close
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated with report:read institution-wide
Active session for HESD-01 / SWE-101 with attendance data
Date range filter covers session scheduled date
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close and record closedAt T_close
Poll GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=:date&to=:date every 30 s
Assert first HTTP 200 includes sessionsHeld ≥ 1 and students array with presentCount/absentCount reflecting closed session
Assert closed session attendance reflected in aggregation (no stale Pending-only counts)
Record elapsed time from T_close to first successful summary
Assert elapsed time ≤ 10 minutes per AC-12c and NFR-07
cases.expected: Institution-wide summary report HTTP contract available within NFR-07 latency target after session close per 08-acceptance-mvp-future AC-12c

cases.title: Flow A steps 6–7: instructor closes session and accesses complete report within 10 minutes
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–5 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active, students checked in, instructor viewed live attendance
Authenticated Instructor assigned to session class-subject
Full E2E stack healthy on ports 3000/3001 with Compose db
steps: Instructor POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close (Flow A step 6) and record closedAt
Poll GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId until HTTP 200 with complete roster (Flow A report verification)
Assert present count matches successful check-ins from step 4–5
Assert remaining enrolled students show Absent (finalized from Pending)
Record elapsed time from close to first complete report
Assert elapsed time ≤ 10 minutes per NFR-07 and MVP exit indicator Report readiness
cases.expected: Flow A workshop lifecycle end-to-end: session close followed by instructor report access within NFR-07 SLA tied to OBJ-03

cases.title: 150-student cohort session report materializes within 10 minutes after close on real PostgreSQL
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and 150 enrolled students (pilot-scale per OBJ-01)
Mixed attendance: ~140 Present, ~10 Pending before close
ReportService and SessionService integration suite per testing-plan §5
Timing harness records close-to-report latency
steps: Invoke SessionService.close(sessionId) for 150-student session and record T0
Poll ReportService.getSessionRoster(sessionId, instructorId) until 150 student rows returned with finalized statuses
Assert query completes without timeout and all Pending rows appear as Absent in report
Record T1 on first complete roster
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 600 seconds
Log latency sample in docs/test-reports/load-test-YYYY-MM-DD.md template for pilot baseline
cases.expected: NFR-07 holds at MVP pilot scale (100–150 participants): complete session report available within 10 minutes per 07-non-functional-risk §2.2 verification

cases.title: Instructor /reports/sessions/:sessionId UI shows complete roster and scoped inline Xuất CSV within 10 minutes of session close
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on desktop viewport assigned to session class-subject with report:read
Active session with enrolled students and at least one Present check-in
Web on port 3000, API + PostgreSQL healthy
Session close performed via instructor UI or API with closedAt recorded
InstructorLayout SidebarNav shows Báo cáo at /reports per 06-app-layout-components §6.2 and AC-18d
steps: Record T0 when instructor closes session (POST close or UI Đóng buổi học action completes)
Navigate to /reports/sessions/:sessionId via SidebarNav Báo cáo or RoleHomeHub Báo cáo điểm danh card per AC-18d
Poll page reload or wait for ReportSummaryCards and AttendanceRosterTable to render complete data every 30 s
Assert ReportSummaryCards show present, absent, excused counts matching finalized attendance
Assert AttendanceRosterTable lists all enrolled students with status badges (no Pending rows)
When roster populated, assert page header or toolbar shows enabled **Xuất CSV** control per AC-12d and 00-production-ui-quality-bar §2
Click inline **Xuất CSV** and assert scoped CSV download succeeds with attendance-export filename and assigned class-subject rows only per AC-13c and API design §8.3
Record T1 when complete roster visible and inline CSV export succeed; assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 600 seconds
cases.expected: Browser journey: instructor views complete session report UI and downloads scoped inline CSV within NFR-07 10-minute window per AC-12d and AC-13c

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin inline Xuất CSV and summary report UI available within 10 minutes of session close
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin on desktop viewport
Closed session with attendance data for HESD-01 / SWE-101
closedAt timestamp recorded at session close
Admin sidebar Báo cáo available per 06-app-layout-components §7.2 and roles-permissions §2.3a
steps: Record T0 at session close completion
Navigate to /admin/reports and apply date filter covering closed session
Wait until ReportSummaryCards and SessionReportTable render closed session with correct counts (poll up to 10 min)
Assert page header or toolbar shows enabled **Xuất CSV** button per AC-12d and AC-13d
Click inline **Xuất CSV** without navigating to /admin/export and assert download succeeds with attendance-export filename
Assert CSV contains institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at columns per API design §8.3
Record T1 when both summary UI and inline CSV export succeed; assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 600 seconds per MVP exit §9 Report readiness
cases.expected: MVP exit indicator satisfied: institution-wide report and inline admin Xuất CSV on /admin/reports both available within 10 minutes of close per AC-13d, §9, and NFR-07

cases.title: POST /api/v1/reports/export returns HTTP 200 CSV within 10 minutes of session close
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated with report:export permission
Session just closed with attendance records for target class-subject and date
Export filter params match closed session scope
steps: Record T0 at POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close completion
Poll POST /api/v1/reports/export with matching filter body every 60 s until HTTP 200 or 10-minute timeout
On HTTP 200, assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8 and Content-Disposition attachment filename
Assert CSV rows include closed session students with attendance_status and checked_in_at where Present
Record T1 on first successful export
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 600 seconds
cases.expected: Admin CSV export HTTP contract available within NFR-07 window alongside summary report per MVP exit timed export evidence

cases.title: Load test gate fails when per-session report not ready within 10 minutes of close (NFR-07 boundary)
preconditions: Load test harness configured per testing-plan §7 Report after close row
Pilot-scale session (100–150 students) with realistic attendance mix
Timing instrumentation records close-to-report latency
docs/test-reports/load-test-YYYY-MM-DD.md template available
steps: Close session and start wall-clock timer at closedAt
Poll GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId until complete roster or 10-minute timeout
If complete report not available within 600 seconds, mark test FAIL and record remediation plan
If complete report available within 600 seconds, mark test PASS for NFR-07 pilot gate
Document latency percentile (p50, p95) in load test report artifact
Assert risk monitoring metric Report generation latency ≤ 10 minutes per 07-non-functional-risk §5
cases.expected: NFR-07 pass/fail boundary enforced at 10 minutes; pilot blocked if report readiness SLA missed per testing-plan §7 and risk monitoring §5

cases.title: Immediate post-close poll may return incomplete roster until finalizeOnClose completes; complete data within 10 minutes
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and Pending attendance rows
SessionService.close invoked; finalizeOnClose runs asynchronously or in same transaction
ReportService.getSessionRoster callable immediately after close returns
steps: Invoke SessionService.close(sessionId) and immediately call ReportService.getSessionRoster
If immediate response contains Pending statuses or partial enrollment, record as pre-finalization state (acceptable transient)
Continue polling getSessionRoster every 5 s for up to 10 minutes
Assert eventual response has zero Pending statuses and full enrollment count
Assert transition from incomplete to complete occurs within 600 seconds
Fail if still incomplete after 10 minutes
cases.expected: NFR-07 allows brief post-close materialization window but mandates complete report within 10 minutes; immediate incomplete state is edge, not SLA violation if finalized in time

cases.title: Student receives immediate 403 on report and export endpoints; authorized instructor report and scoped export within NFR-07
preconditions: Session Closed with complete attendance data available to instructor
Authenticated Student session (no report:read per roles-permissions §2.2)
Authenticated assigned Instructor session for same sessionId
steps: Student GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId and assert immediate HTTP 403 with errorCode Forbidden or ReportAccessDenied (no 10-minute wait)
Student GET /api/v1/reports/summary and assert immediate HTTP 403 with localized permission-denied message per roles-permissions §2.5
Student POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body and assert immediate HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed per AC-13b and API design §8.3
Instructor GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId and assert HTTP 200 with complete roster within 10 minutes of closedAt
Instructor POST /api/v1/reports/export for assigned class-subject filters and assert HTTP 200 text/csv within 10 minutes of closedAt per AC-13c
Verify NFR-07 timing measurement uses authorized actor only
Assert Student denial does not leak roster or CSV data regardless of elapsed time since close
cases.expected: NFR-07 report availability SLA targets authorized instructor/admin viewers; student report and export denied immediately; instructor in-scope export available within NFR-07 window per BR-08, AC-13b, and AC-13c

cases.title: ReportService.getClassSubjectSummary aggregation available within 10 minutes after session close for date range
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Closed session in HESD-01 / SWE-101 within June 2026
ReportService.getClassSubjectSummary wired with attendance read models
Instructor assigned to class-subject via ClassAssignment
steps: Close session and record closedAt T0
Poll ReportService.getClassSubjectSummary({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from, to }, instructorId) every 10 s
Assert SummaryDto sessionsHeld includes newly closed session
Assert student presentCount/absentCount reflect finalized attendance from close
Record T1 on first accurate aggregation
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 600 seconds
cases.expected: Integration scenario: class-subject summary aggregation materializes within NFR-07 window after session close per FR-12 reporting requirement

cases.title: Instructor SidebarNav shows Báo cáo at /reports; zero /admin/* links in layout chrome
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on desktop viewport with report:read for assigned class-subject
Web on port 3000 healthy; InstructorLayout rendered
SidebarNav filtered via usePermittedNav per 06-app-layout-components §6.2 and roles-permissions §2.3a
steps: Navigate to /sessions and assert InstructorLayout SidebarNav visible
Assert SidebarNav contains Báo cáo link with href /reports (report:read permitted)
Assert RoleHomeHub shows Tạo buổi học mới, Buổi học của tôi, and Báo cáo điểm danh cards per AC-18d and 06-app-layout-components §6.2
Assert SidebarNav contains Báo cáo (/reports) but omits admin Xuất CSV nav link to /admin/export; instructor uses inline Xuất CSV on /reports per AC-13c and roles-permissions §2.3a
Query all anchor href attributes in layout chrome (sidebar, top bar, hub cards)
Assert zero href values match /admin or /admin/* prefix per AC-18a and BR-14
Direct navigate to /admin/export and assert ForbiddenPage without AdminLayout chrome leaked
On viewport < md, open hamburger drawer and re-assert zero /admin/* links
cases.expected: Report nav exposed only on permitted instructor routes; SidebarNav omits admin-only items; NFR-07 latency verification applies to authorized Báo cáo entry points without admin nav leakage per 06-app-layout-components §6.2

cases.title: Student BottomNav omits Báo cáo and all /admin/* routes lacking report:read
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with checkin:submit and attendance:read (self)
StudentLayout BottomNav filtered via usePermittedNav per 06-app-layout-components §5.3
Student has no report:read per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: Navigate to /check-in and inspect StudentLayout chrome
Assert BottomNav contains only Điểm danh (/check-in) and Lịch sử (/history) per roles-permissions §2.3a
Assert no nav item or hub card href matches /reports, /admin, or /admin/*
Assert Báo cáo label absent from DOM (omitted not disabled) per BR-14
Direct navigate to /reports and assert ForbiddenPage without report shell, ReportSummaryCards, or Báo cáo điểm danh chrome per guardrails Reports RBAC
Assert no **Xuất CSV** control visible anywhere in student layout per AC-13b
Assert denial is immediate (NFR-07 10-minute SLA applies only to authorized viewers)
cases.expected: Student chrome omits report and admin navigation items; /reports renders ForbiddenPage before report shell mounts; unauthorized access denied immediately so NFR-07 latency scope is instructor and admin viewers only

cases.title: Instructor POST /reports/export returns scoped HTTP 200 CSV within 10 minutes of session close
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with report:read for class-subject pair
Active session closed with mixed attendance for assigned class-subject
closedAt timestamp recorded at POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/close
Export filter body matches closed session classCode, subjectCode, and date range
steps: Record T0 at session close completion (HTTP 200 status Closed)
Poll POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from, to } using Instructor session every 60 s until HTTP 200 or 10-minute timeout
On HTTP 200, assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8 and Content-Disposition attachment filename
Assert CSV rows include closed session students with attendance_status and checked_in_at where Present
Assert CSV contains only assigned class-subject scope (no cross-assignment rows) per AC-13c and API design §8.3
Record T1 on first successful scoped export
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 600 seconds
cases.expected: Instructor scoped CSV export HTTP contract available within NFR-07 window after session close per AC-13c, FR-13, and MVP exit Report readiness indicator
